name: ChatZoo
description: Real-time bridge between OpenClaw and the ChatZoo iOS app backend. Replaces RPC-based communication with an event-driven channel plugin.

hookToken.description: Shared secret (hookToken from ComputerInstance) for authenticating webhook calls

deliveryTimeoutMs.description: Milliseconds to wait for in-app delivery before falling back to push notification

computerDefaultModel.description: The real OpenRouter model ID behind chatzoo-default (e.g. openai/gpt-5.4)

providerBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the gateway LLM proxy (e.g. https://…/v1/computer/llm)

providerApiKey.description: Per-user API key the gateway proxy expects
